page_metadata.biotools__summary: CCQTL is a wrapper around the R/qtl2 (Broman et al, Genetics 2019 10.1534/genetics.118.301595) functions, with hard-coded parameters tailored for QTL mapping in the Collaborative Cross.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CCQTL is a wrapper around the R/qtl2 (Broman et al, Genetics 2019 10.1534/genetics.118.301595) functions, with hard-coded parameters tailored for QTL mapping in the Collaborative Cross.
